task_completion.description: Apache OpenOffice Writer is used to create the document
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Apache OpenOffice Writer application window open with a document being edited.

task_completion.description: Document includes the BOL number in the title and an auto-generated Table of Contents
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document displays a title containing 'GLI-BOL-2024-03847' and a Table of Contents section (typically indicated by a gray background shading over the text, which is standard for auto-generated fields in OpenOffice).

task_completion.description: Page numbers are included in the document footer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bottom margin (footer area) of the document pages contains visible page numbers.

task_completion.description: Required sections are present and formatted with Heading styles
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document contains sections named 'Shipper/Carrier Info', 'Cargo Manifest', 'Delivery Schedule', 'Hazmat Declaration', and 'Certifications'. These section titles appear larger and bolder than body text, indicating the use of 'Heading 1' or 'Heading 2' styles.

task_completion.description: Tables are created for the cargo manifest, delivery schedule, and hazmat items
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least three distinct grid-style tables are visible in the document, corresponding to the cargo, delivery, and hazmat sections.

task_completion.description: The document is populated with the correct shipment data from the JSON file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text or tables contain specific data such as carrier 'Great Lakes Intermodal Transport', cities like 'Akron', 'Davenport', or 'Moorhead', and UN numbers like 'UN1133', 'UN1066', or 'UN3481'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenOffice Writer GUI to format the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with OpenOffice Writer menus, toolbars, or dialog boxes (like Insert Table, Styles and Formatting, or Insert Indexes and Tables) rather than just a terminal script generating an ODT file.

integrity.description: The agent opened and read the source JSON file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor, file viewer, or terminal command (like cat or less) displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/shipment_data.json'.

integrity.description: The Table of Contents was auto-generated, not manually typed
integrity.visual_evidence: The Table of Contents shows field shading (gray background behind the text) or the 'Insert Index/Table' dialog is visible in the trajectory, proving it was generated via the software feature.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected BOL number is GLI-BOL-2024-03847. The carrier is 'Great Lakes Intermodal Transport, Inc.'. Delivery cities must include Akron, Davenport, and Moorhead. Hazmat UN numbers are UN1133, UN1066, and UN3481 (Note: UN1956 is incorrect and should not appear). The document must contain at least 3 tables and utilize Heading 1 and Heading 2 styles.
